results.title: Asian shares drop after plunge in Big Tech stocks gives Wall St its worst day in months
results.description: TOKYO (AP) — Asian shares skidded Monday after worries about Big Tech investments and rising odds for an interest rate hike gave U.S. stocks their worst day since October. Japan’s benchmark Nikkei 225 dropped 4.2% to 63,804.77.

results.title: Oil prices are volatile with potential easing of violence after an exchange of fire
results.description: Wall Street pointed toward gains early Monday and oil prices are volatile with a potential easing of violence even as Israel and Iran exchange fire.
